page: Google Cloud Platform m4n-megamem-28 is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance belonging to the m4n server family. It features 28 dedicated vCPUs built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and is equipped with 372.0 GB of system memory. This configuration yields a high memory-to-core ratio of 13.29 GB per vCPU, designed specifically for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity relative to compute resources.

This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met through attached network storage volumes. Additionally, the instance does not come with complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The absence of local storage and GPU hardware makes this server highly specialized for memory-bound, non-graphical processing tasks.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the m4n-megamem-28 offers a dense memory allocation per core, which is suitable for optimizing licensing costs for software billed per vCPU. It is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, real-time data analytics, and memory-bound caching layers.
description: Google Cloud Platform m4n-megamem-28 is a memory-optimized instance within the m4n family, featuring 28 dedicated vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture and 372.0 GB of RAM. With a high memory-to-core ratio of 13.29 GB per vCPU, this instance is engineered for memory-intensive enterprise applications. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external network storage for data persistence. The high memory density makes it a qualitatively cost-effective option for workloads where software licensing is tied to vCPU count but memory demands are high. It is suitable for hosting in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, and real-time data analytics pipelines.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform m4n-megamem-28 is a memory-optimized instance featuring 28 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 372 GB of RAM, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and databases.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 virtual machine featuring high memory density with twenty-eight dedicated vCPUs and three hundred seventy-two gigabytes of RAM.

No local storage or integrated GPU hardware included
Optimized for in-memory databases and large caching layers
Qualitatively cost-effective for vCPU-licensed memory-bound workloads
